name: team-01
title: Team members
description: A team management card listing members with avatars and per-member role selects, plus an invite-by-email row. Use in settings or workspace admin pages.

files.content:
import * as React from "react" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle, } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input" import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, } from "@/components/ui/select" import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator" const members = [ { name: "Sofia Davis", email: "sofia@example.com", role: "owner", avatar: "https://github.com/shadcn.png", initials: "SD", }, { name: "Jackson Lee", email: "jackson@example.com", role: "member", avatar: "", initials: "JL", }, { name: "Isabella Nguyen", email: "isabella@example.com", role: "member", avatar: "", initials: "IN", }, ] const roles = [ { value: "owner", label: "Owner" }, { value: "member", label: "Member" }, { value: "viewer", label: "Viewer" }, ] export function TeamMembers({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) { return (
Team members Invite your team members to collaborate. {members.map((member) => (
{member.avatar ? ( ) : null} {member.initials}

{member.name}

{member.email}

))}

Invite by email

 Members can view and edit shared projects.
) }
